items.title: Sinner leading Medvedev before semi-final postponed
items.summary: Jannik Sinner overcomes his physical struggles to lead Daniil Madvedev in a deciding set before rain stops their compelling Italian Open semi-final.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Guardiola insists he has 'one more year' on Man City deal
items.summary: Manager Pep Guardiola insists he has "one more year" remaining on his contract at Manchester City as speculation continues over his future at the club.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
